sent_simp: 她从小就梦想成为一名歌星。
sent_trad: 她從小就夢想成為一名歌星。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù mèng xiǎng chéng wéi yī míng gē xīng.
english: She has dreamed of becoming a famous singer since she was little.

sent_simp: 节日晚会上有精彩的歌舞表演。
sent_trad: 節日晚會上有精彩的歌舞表演。
pinyin: Jié rì wǎn huì shàng yǒu jīng cǎi de gē wǔ biǎo yǎn.
english: There were wonderful singing and dancing performances at the holiday show.

sent_simp: 很多歌迷在场外等着见偶像。
sent_trad: 很多歌迷在場外等著見偶像。
pinyin: Hěn duō gē mí zài chǎng wài děng zhe jiàn ǒu xiàng.
english: Many fans waited outside the venue hoping to see their idol.

sent_simp: 他为人正直，从不说谎。
sent_trad: 他為人正直，從不說謊。
pinyin: Tā wéi rén zhèng zhí, cóng bù shuō huǎng.
english: He is an upright person and never lies.

sent_simp: 此前他从来没有出过国。
sent_trad: 此前他從來沒有出過國。
pinyin: Cǐ qián tā cóng lái méi yǒu chū guò guó.
english: Before this, he had never been abroad.

sent_simp: 地铁里有专门供残疾人使用的通道。
sent_trad: 地鐵裡有專門供殘疾人使用的通道。
pinyin: Dì tiě lǐ yǒu zhuān mén gōng cán jí rén shǐ yòng de tōng dào.
english: The subway has dedicated passageways for people with disabilities.

sent_simp: 请把这篇文章分成几个段落。
sent_trad: 請把這篇文章分成幾個段落。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhè piān wén zhāng fēn chéng jǐ gè duàn luò.
english: Please divide this article into a few paragraphs.

sent_simp: 这座殿堂已有几百年的历史。
sent_trad: 這座殿堂已有幾百年的歷史。
pinyin: Zhè zuò diàn táng yǐ yǒu jǐ bǎi nián de lì shǐ.
english: This palace hall has a history of several hundred years.

sent_simp: 洪水毁坏了不少农田。
sent_trad: 洪水毀壞了不少農田。
pinyin: Hóng shuǐ huǐ huài le bù shǎo nóng tián.
english: The flood damaged a lot of farmland.

sent_simp: 每逢过年，全家人都聚在一起吃饭。
sent_trad: 每逢過年，全家人都聚在一起吃飯。
pinyin: Měi féng guò nián, quán jiā rén dōu jù zài yī qǐ chī fàn.
english: Every time the New Year comes, the whole family gathers to eat together.

sent_simp: 这个村子保留了很多传统民俗。
sent_trad: 這個村子保留了很多傳統民俗。
pinyin: Zhè ge cūn zi bǎo liú le hěn duō chuán tǒng mín sú.
english: This village has preserved many traditional folk customs.

sent_simp: 奶奶喜欢唱家乡的民歌。
sent_trad: 奶奶喜歡唱家鄉的民歌。
pinyin: Nǎi nai xǐ huān chàng jiā xiāng de mín gē.
english: Grandma loves singing folk songs from her hometown.

sent_simp: 这款飞机主要用于民用航空。
sent_trad: 這款飛機主要用於民用航空。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn fēi jī zhǔ yào yòng yú mín yòng háng kōng.
english: This type of aircraft is mainly used for civilian aviation.

sent_simp: 今天气温很低，记得多穿衣服。
sent_trad: 今天氣溫很低，記得多穿衣服。
pinyin: Jīn tiān qì wēn hěn dī, jì de duō chuān yī fu.
english: The temperature is very low today — remember to dress warmly.

sent_simp: 南方今年发生了严重的水灾。
sent_trad: 南方今年發生了嚴重的水災。
pinyin: Nán fāng jīn nián fā shēng le yán zhòng de shuǐ zāi.
english: The south experienced a serious flood this year.

sent_simp: 农民正在田里插水稻秧苗。
sent_trad: 農民正在田裡插水稻秧苗。
pinyin: Nóng mín zhèng zài tián lǐ chā shuǐ dào yāng miáo.
english: Farmers are planting rice seedlings in the fields.

sent_simp: 他去北京求学，希望考上名校。
sent_trad: 他去北京求學，希望考上名校。
pinyin: Tā qù Běi jīng qiú xué, xī wàng kǎo shàng míng xiào.
english: He went to Beijing to study, hoping to get into a top university.

sent_simp: 工厂的污水排放污染了附近的河流。
sent_trad: 工廠的污水排放污染了附近的河流。
pinyin: Gōng chǎng de wū shuǐ pái fàng wū rǎn le fù jìn de hé liú.
english: The factory's sewage discharge polluted the nearby river.

sent_simp: 摇一摇瓶子，底部的沉淀就散开了。
sent_trad: 搖一搖瓶子，底部的沈澱就散開了。
pinyin: Yáo yi yáo píng zi, dǐ bù de chén diàn jiù sàn kāi le.
english: Give the bottle a shake and the sediment at the bottom will disperse.

sent_simp: 他每周参加一次读书沙龙。
sent_trad: 他每週參加一次讀書沙龍。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu cān jiā yī cì dú shū shā lóng.
english: He attends a book salon once a week.

sent_simp: 这个老手艺渐渐没落，会的人越来越少了。
sent_trad: 這個老手藝漸漸沒落，會的人越來越少了。
pinyin: Zhè ge lǎo shǒu yì jiàn jiàn mò luò, huì de rén yuè lái yuè shǎo le.
english: This old craft is gradually declining, and fewer and fewer people know it.

sent_simp: 客厅墙上挂着一幅风景油画。
sent_trad: 客廳牆上掛著一幅風景油畫。
pinyin: Kè tīng qiáng shàng guà zhe yī fú fēng jǐng yóu huà.
english: A landscape oil painting hangs on the living room wall.

sent_simp: 医生用这种草药治病已经多年了。
sent_trad: 醫生用這種草藥治病已經多年了。
pinyin: Yī shēng yòng zhè zhǒng cǎo yào zhì bìng yǐ jīng duō nián le.
english: The doctor has been using this herbal medicine to treat illness for many years.

sent_simp: 黄河沿岸的城市越来越多。
sent_trad: 黃河沿岸的城市越來越多。
pinyin: Huáng Hé yán àn de chéng shì yuè lái yuè duō.
english: There are more and more cities along the banks of the Yellow River.

sent_simp: 高铁沿线开了很多新的商业区。
sent_trad: 高鐵沿線開了很多新的商業區。
pinyin: Gāo tiě yán xiàn kāi le hěn duō xīn de shāng yè qū.
english: Many new commercial districts have opened along the high-speed rail line.

sent_simp: 健全的法制是社会稳定的基础。
sent_trad: 健全的法制是社會穩定的基礎。
pinyin: Jiàn quán de fǎ zhì shì shè huì wěn dìng de jī chǔ.
english: A sound legal system is the foundation of social stability.

sent_simp: 驾车前要了解当地的交通法规。
sent_trad: 駕車前要了解當地的交通法規。
pinyin: Jià chē qián yào liǎo jiě dāng dì de jiāo tōng fǎ guī.
english: Before driving, you should familiarize yourself with local traffic regulations.

sent_simp: 山里的空气洁净，让人心情很好。
sent_trad: 山裡的空氣潔淨，讓人心情很好。
pinyin: Shān lǐ de kōng qì jié jìng, ràng rén xīn qíng hěn hǎo.
english: The air in the mountains is clean and fresh, which lifts your spirits.

sent_simp: 双方正在洽谈合作的细节。
sent_trad: 雙方正在洽談合作的細節。
pinyin: Shuāng fāng zhèng zài qià tán hé zuò de xì jié.
english: Both sides are currently discussing the details of their cooperation.

sent_simp: 长江流域的气候比较温暖湿润。
sent_trad: 長江流域的氣候比較溫暖濕潤。
pinyin: Cháng Jiāng liú yù de qì hòu bǐ jiào wēn nuǎn shī rùn.
english: The climate in the Yangtze River basin is relatively warm and humid.

sent_simp: 冬天容易得流感，要注意保暖。
sent_trad: 冬天容易得流感，要注意保暖。
pinyin: Dōng tiān róng yì dé liú gǎn, yào zhù yì bǎo nuǎn.
english: It's easy to catch the flu in winter, so make sure to keep warm.

sent_simp: 他的中文说得很流畅。
sent_trad: 他的中文說得很流暢。
pinyin: Tā de Zhōng wén shuō de hěn liú chàng.
english: His Chinese is very fluent.

sent_simp: 土地流转让农民增加了不少收入。
sent_trad: 土地流轉讓農民增加了不少收入。
pinyin: Tǔ dì liú zhuǎn ràng nóng mín zēng jiā le bù shǎo shōu rù.
english: The circulation of land use rights has significantly increased farmers' income.

sent_simp: 科学家测定了这块骨头的年龄。
sent_trad: 科學家測定了這塊骨頭的年齡。
pinyin: Kē xué jiā cè dìng le zhè kuài gǔ tou de nián líng.
english: Scientists determined the age of this bone.

sent_simp: 工程师测算了建桥所需的费用。
sent_trad: 工程師測算了建橋所需的費用。
pinyin: Gōng chéng shī cè suàn le jiàn qiáo suǒ xū de fèi yòng.
english: The engineer measured and calculated the cost required to build the bridge.

sent_simp: 你用什么浏览器上网？
sent_trad: 你用什麼瀏覽器上網？
pinyin: Nǐ yòng shén me liú lǎn qì shàng wǎng?
english: What browser do you use to surf the internet?

sent_simp: 咖啡散发出浓郁的香气。
sent_trad: 咖啡散發出濃郁的香氣。
pinyin: Kā fēi sàn fā chū nóng yù de xiāng qì.
english: The coffee gives off a rich, strong aroma.

sent_simp: 那场战争是这座城市的一场浩劫。
sent_trad: 那場戰爭是這座城市的一場浩劫。
pinyin: Nà chǎng zhàn zhēng shì zhè zuò chéng shì de yī chǎng hào jié.
english: That war was a catastrophe for this city.

sent_simp: 入境时要在海关申报携带的物品。
sent_trad: 入境時要在海關申報攜帶的物品。
pinyin: Rù jìng shí yào zài hǎi guān shēn bào xié dài de wù pǐn.
english: When entering the country, you need to declare the items you are carrying at customs.

sent_simp: 这位作家的作品在海内外都很有名。
sent_trad: 這位作家的作品在海內外都很有名。
pinyin: Zhè wèi zuò jiā de zuò pǐn zài hǎi nèi wài dōu hěn yǒu míng.
english: This writer's works are well known both at home and abroad.
